title: Onboarding topic detail page with markdown tabs and related files sidebar
purpose: Displays detailed information about a specific topic in the onboarding flow, including markdown content, related files, and onboarding features like progress tracking and notes.
module_context: Exports a React component that handles topic detail display with markdown rendering, tab navigation, progress tracking, note management, and related file linking.

steps.content: Extract the topic name from URL parameters.
Access project, mode, and current user data from onboarding context.
Initialize state for topic data, active tab, loading status, progress, notes, and new note input.
Fetch topic data from API when project and name are available.
Parse related topics from the fetched content.
Fetch user progress and notes when in onboarding mode.
Render loading or not found state while fetching data.
Display topic header with name and file path.
Show progress tracking buttons when in onboarding mode.
Render tab navigation for overview, functions, and dependencies.
Display markdown content for the active tab.
Show notes section with add and delete functionality when in onboarding mode.
Render sidebar with related files links.
Validate that project, topic name, and current user are available.
Mark the topic progress in the API with the specified status.
Update local progress state with the new progress entry.
Validate that project, topic name, and current user are available.
Delete the progress entry from the API.
Clear local progress state.
Validate that project, topic name, current user, and note content are available.
Add the new note to the API.
Update local notes state by prepending the new note.
Clear the new note input field.
Validate that project is available.
Delete the note from the API using its ID.
Update local notes state by filtering out the deleted note.
Return empty array if content is empty.
Initialize an array to collect related topic links.
Extract markdown links using regex pattern matching.
Extract bolded topic names using regex pattern matching.
Ensure no duplicate topic names are added to the results.
Return the collected list of related topic names.
